hero.headline: Every Asset Produces Energy. PREDAIOT Ensures It Produces Value.
hero.subhead: Identify hidden economic losses, optimize dispatch decisions, and recover untapped value across solar, battery, and industrial energy assets — built on Oman's own market data.

leak.headline: We'll Find Your Leak in 7 Days — Free. No Catch.
leak.sub: A free diagnostic of your asset's economic performance, scaled from Oman's published market data.
leak.name: Full name
leak.uploadHint: Optional — telemetry or dispatch logs. We never execute uploaded files.
leak.noDataHint: We'll show an illustrative result scaled from the 862,903 OMR / 500 MW benchmark.
leak.resultIllustrative: Directional estimate — scaled from PREDAIOT's published 862,903 OMR / 500 MW benchmark. Your diagnostic uses your own 8,760-hour data for the final number.
leak.thanks: Thank you — your Leak Test request is in.
leak.thanksBody: We'll send your result via WhatsApp and email within 7 days.
leak.rateLimited: You've already requested a Leak Test in the last 30 days. We'll be in touch.

home.problemBody: Most energy assets are tuned for technical performance — availability, uptime, round-trip efficiency. Almost none are tuned for economic dispatch against live market prices. That gap is where value quietly leaks.
home.solutionBody: Our Shadow Economic Engine replays your asset against Oman's real market signals — System Marginal Price, scarcity pricing, dispatch windows — to find recoverable value with zero CAPEX.
home.how1Body: Share basic asset details. We benchmark your economic efficiency against published Oman market data.
home.how2Body: A full 8,760-hour analysis of your asset, delivered in 7 days with a recoverable-value report.
home.how3Body: 90-day shadow-mode pilot, then revenue-share deployment with zero upfront cost.
home.trustSub: We only show what's real — verifiable milestones, and moving fast.
home.ctaTitle: Find out what your asset is leaving on the table.
home.ctaBody: Free for 7 days, with a written guarantee.

audit.title: Economic Audit
audit.lead: Start with the free 7-Day Leak Test. Upgrade to a full audit only if we find value.
audit.freeDesc: Economic efficiency benchmark with a written 5% guarantee.
audit.pilotDesc: 90-day shadow-mode pilot running alongside your operations.
audit.deploymentDesc: Revenue-share, zero upfront. We earn only when you recover value.
audit.promoNote: 50% off the full audit — first 10 clients or within 14 days.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.lead: Transparent, in OMR. USD shown as an indicative secondary.
pricing.auditValue: A complete 8,760-hour economic model of your asset against Oman's market signals — backed by our written guarantee: if we don't find at least 5% in recoverable value, you pay nothing.
pricing.deployLine: 40% PREDAIOT / 60% client revenue share · zero upfront

bess.title: BESS Economic Optimization
bess.lead: Your battery is technically healthy. Is it economically optimal?
bess.p1Body: A battery can hit 95% round-trip efficiency and still dispatch at the wrong hours. Economic optimization aligns charge/discharge with market price signals.
bess.lever1: Price-aware dispatch against System Marginal Price

solar.title: Solar + Storage
solar.lead: Stack solar generation with storage economics for compounding value.
solar.body: Solar assets paired with storage unlock arbitrage and curtailment-recovery value. PREDAIOT models the combined economic envelope against Oman market data.

technology.title: Architecture
technology.lead: The Shadow Economic Engine — how we turn public market data into recoverable value.
technology.pipelineBody: Ingest asset telemetry → align with Oman market signals (SMP, scarcity) → replay dispatch → quantify the economic gap.
technology.secondaryLabel: Peak-case internal simulation — smaller asset class

industries.title: Industries we serve
industries.lead: Six verticals where economic dispatch decisions move real money.
industries.utilitiesDesc: Grid-scale dispatch economics and portfolio optimization.

security.title: Security
security.lead: Your data is treated as confidential operational telemetry.

items.https: HTTPS enforced end-to-end, no mixed content.
items.auth: Firebase Authentication manages session tokens and CSRF protection.
items.uploads: Uploads are validated server-side (CSV/Excel only, ≤10MB, schema-checked, macros rejected) and never executed.
items.rules: Firestore rules ensure users can only read and write their own data.
items.encryption: Uploaded telemetry is encrypted at rest in Firebase Storage with strict access rules.
items.audit: Every data-access event is logged with user, action, and timestamp.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: Aligned with Oman's Personal Data Protection Law (Royal Decree 6/2022).

cases.title: Case Study & Traction
cases.simLabel: Methodology Validation Study — Applied to Oman's published 2024 grid data. Results independently verifiable at opendata.gov.om
cases.simBody: Using PREDAIOT's published methodology on Oman's National Open Data Portal, a 500 MW asset shows 862,903 OMR in additional annual revenue — a 9.1%–15% profitability increase with zero CAPEX.

papers.paper1Title: The Hidden Economic Opportunity in Oman's Energy Transition
papers.paper1Desc: How published Oman market data reveals recoverable value across energy assets.

about.title: About PREDAIOT
about.founderBio: Chams Eddine Madi founded PREDAIOT to close the economic decision gap in energy assets — turning Oman's own published market data into recoverable value for operators across the GCC.
about.story: PREDAIOT began with a simple observation: energy assets across Oman and the GCC are engineered for technical performance, yet almost none are optimized for economic dispatch against live market prices. That gap — between producing energy and producing value — is where money quietly leaks. We built a patented method to find it and recover it, with zero CAPEX.
about.missionBody: Every asset produces energy. We make sure it produces value.
